attributes.title: Sparrow WiFi — New Devices (< 5 minutes)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow WiFi \u2014 New Devices (< 5 minutes)", "type": "table", "params": {"perPage": 25, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "sort": {"columnIndex": null, "direction": null}, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum"}, "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Observations"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "source.mac", "size": 50, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "customLabel": "MAC Address"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "wifi.ssid", "size": 3, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "customLabel": "SSID"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "device.class_guess", "size": 3, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1", "otherBucket": false, "customLabel": "Device Class"}}]}
attributes.description: Devices first observed less than 5 minutes ago

attributes.description: Devices with randomized MACs seen for the first time in the last 5 minutes

attributes.title: Sparrow WiFi — Truly New Networks (First-Ever Seen < 5 min)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Sparrow WiFi — Truly New Networks (First-Ever Seen < 5 min)", "type": "vega", "params": {"spec": "{\"$schema\": \"https://vega.github.io/schema/vega-lite/v5.json\", \"title\": {\"text\": \"Truly New WiFi Networks — First-Ever Seen < 5 min\", \"anchor\": \"start\", \"fontSize\": 16}, \"config\": {\"view\": {\"stroke\": null}, \"axis\": {\"domain\": false, \"ticks\": false, \"labels\": false, \"title\": null}}, \"data\": {\"url\": {\"index\": \"sparrow-wifi-*\", \"body\": {\"size\": 0, \"query\": {\"match_all\": {}}, \"aggs\": {\"new_macs\": {\"terms\": {\"field\": \"source.mac\", \"size\": 100, \"order\": {\"first_ever\": \"desc\"}}, \"aggs\": {\"first_ever\": {\"min\": {\"field\": \"@timestamp\"}}, \"last_seen\": {\"max\": {\"field\": \"@timestamp\"}}, \"name\": {\"top_hits\": {\"size\": 1, \"_source\": [\"wifi.ssid\"], \"sort\": [{\"@timestamp\": \"desc\"}]}}, \"vendor\": {\"top_hits\": {\"size\": 1, \"_source\": [\"wifi.mac_vendor\"], \"sort\": [{\"@timestamp\": \"desc\"}]}}, \"class_guess\": {\"top_hits\": {\"size\": 1, \"_source\": [\"device.class_guess\"], \"sort\": [{\"@timestamp\": \"desc\"}]}}, \"max_signal\": {\"max\": {\"field\": \"signal.strength_dbm\"}}, \"only_truly_new\": {\"bucket_selector\": {\"buckets_path\": {\"f\": \"first_ever\"}, \"script\": {\"source\": \"params.f >= (System.currentTimeMillis() - 300000L)\", \"lang\": \"painless\"}}}}}}}}, \"format\": {\"property\": \"aggregations.new_macs.buckets\"}}, \"transform\": [{\"calculate\": \"datum.key\", \"as\": \"mac\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.name.hits.hits.length > 0 ? datum.name.hits.hits[0]._source.wifi?.ssid : '(no name)'\", \"as\": \"name_txt\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.vendor.hits.hits.length > 0 ? datum.vendor.hits.hits[0]._source.wifi?.mac_vendor : '(unknown)'\", \"as\": \"vendor_txt\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.class_guess.hits.hits.length > 0 ? (datum.class_guess.hits.hits[0]._source.device ? datum.class_guess.hits.hits[0]._source.device.class_guess : '?') : '?'\", \"as\": \"class_txt\"}, {\"calculate\": \"utcFormat(toDate(datum.first_ever.value), '%H:%M:%S') + 'Z'\", \"as\": \"first_ever_txt\"}, {\"calculate\": \"round((now() - datum.first_ever.value) / 1000) + 's ago'\", \"as\": \"age_txt\"}, {\"calculate\": \"datum.max_signal.value != null ? round(datum.max_signal.value) + ' dBm' : ''\", \"as\": \"rssi_txt\"}, {\"window\": [{\"op\": \"row_number\", \"as\": \"row_num\"}]}], \"height\": {\"step\": 20}, \"layer\": [{\"mark\": {\"type\": \"text\", \"align\": \"left\", \"baseline\": \"middle\", \"fontSize\": 12, \"font\": \"monospace\"}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"row_num\", \"type\": \"ordinal\", \"axis\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\"}, \"x\": {\"datum\": 0, \"axis\": null}, \"text\": {\"field\": \"age_txt\", \"type\": \"nominal\"}, \"color\": {\"value\": \"#bd4c4c\"}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"text\", \"align\": \"left\", \"baseline\": \"middle\", \"fontSize\": 12, \"font\": \"monospace\"}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"row_num\", \"type\": \"ordinal\", \"axis\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\"}, \"x\": {\"datum\": 70, \"axis\": null}, \"text\": {\"field\": \"mac\", \"type\": \"nominal\"}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"text\", \"align\": \"left\", \"baseline\": \"middle\", \"fontSize\": 12}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"row_num\", \"type\": \"ordinal\", \"axis\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\"}, \"x\": {\"datum\": 210, \"axis\": null}, \"text\": {\"field\": \"name_txt\", \"type\": \"nominal\"}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"text\", \"align\": \"left\", \"baseline\": \"middle\", \"fontSize\": 12}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"row_num\", \"type\": \"ordinal\", \"axis\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\"}, \"x\": {\"datum\": 400, \"axis\": null}, \"text\": {\"field\": \"vendor_txt\", \"type\": \"nominal\"}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"text\", \"align\": \"left\", \"baseline\": \"middle\", \"fontSize\": 12}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"row_num\", \"type\": \"ordinal\", \"axis\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\"}, \"x\": {\"datum\": 560, \"axis\": null}, \"text\": {\"field\": \"class_txt\", \"type\": \"nominal\"}}}, {\"mark\": {\"type\": \"text\", \"align\": \"left\", \"baseline\": \"middle\", \"fontSize\": 12}, \"encoding\": {\"y\": {\"field\": \"row_num\", \"type\": \"ordinal\", \"axis\": null, \"sort\": \"ascending\"}, \"x\": {\"datum\": 680, \"axis\": null}, \"text\": {\"field\": \"rssi_txt\", \"type\": \"nominal\"}}}], \"width\": 760}"}, "aggs": []}
attributes.description: WiFi networks whose MIN(@timestamp) across the entire history is within the last 5 minutes. This is a true 'never seen before' view that survives bridge/agent restarts and works across multiple sensors (ES index is the source of truth). Columns: age, source.mac, wifi.ssid, wifi.mac_vendor, device.class_guess, max RSSI.

attributes.title: Sparrow WiFi — New Device Detection
attributes.description: Alert-style dashboard highlighting devices seen for the first time, potential drone controllers, and privacy-probing randomized MACs
